meta.title: Slice House — The Taste That's Remembered
meta.description: Handmade artisanal pizza, made with passion. Order online from Slice House — no account, no online payment.

hero.title: The taste that's remembered.
hero.subtitle: Fresh ingredients every day, carefully worked dough, and 100% natural olive oil. Order online — we'll handle the rest.

offers.heading: This Month's Offers
offers.subheading: Limited-time deals — grab them before they're gone.
offers.empty: No active offers right now. Check out our full menu below!

menu.heading: Menu
menu.subheading: Our full menu, right here — no PDF, just add and order.

wheel.heading: Can't decide what to order?
wheel.subheading: Spin the Lucky Wheel and let fate pick your next pizza.

checkout.heading: Complete Your Order
checkout.subheading: Fill in your details — we'll call you to confirm.
checkout.locationError: Couldn't find your location. Please type your address instead.
checkout.previewRoute: Preview the route from us to you
checkout.submitError: Something went wrong. Try again or call us directly.

success.title: Order received!
success.message: Thank you! We'll call you shortly to confirm your order.

errors.phone: Please enter a valid phone number

owner.subject: New order from {name}
owner.heading: New Order
owner.confirmHint: Call the customer to confirm, then click the button above to email them a confirmation.

customer.subject: Your Slice House order is confirmed!
customer.heading: Your order is confirmed!
customer.message: Your order is being carefully prepared. Thanks for choosing Slice House!
